scripts.coverage:80: npm run coverage:unit --prefix frontend && npm run coverage:80:services
scripts.coverage:80:services: npm run coverage:unit --prefix services/admin-service && npm run coverage:unit --prefix services/analytics-service && npm run coverage:unit --prefix services/book-service && npm run coverage:unit --prefix services/chat-service && npm run coverage:unit --prefix services/forum-service && npm run coverage:unit --prefix services/review-service && npm run coverage:unit --prefix services/user-library-service && npm run coverage:unit --prefix services/user-service
